title: Serviettenshop 20 Blue Flower Pattern Napkins, 3-Ply, 33 x 33 cm, Pack of 20
features: Contents: each pack contains 20 napkins. These are each 3-ply, so not too thin.
Design: Beautiful flower motif as a table decoration for special occasions (colour variations possible)
Quality: these paper napkins are produced under high quality standards in Germany and are subject to constant control
Environment: the production takes place only from environmentally friendly raw materials and are biodegradable

Dimensions: the motif napkins are open 33 x 33 cm. In the pack folded to 16.5 x 16.5 cm. You can see 1/4 of the motif in the main picture. By the way: the napkins are suitable for crafting with decoupage / decoupage technique
description: Product details: - Motif napkins. - Design as shown (colour variations possible). - Image = ¼ of the napkin. - Blank reverse side. - 3-ply. - 1 pack of 20 pieces. - Open format: 33 x 33 cm. - Folded to: 16.5 x 16.5 cm. - Material: paper (tissue). - Made in Germany. - Environmentally conscious and gentle production. Immerse yourself in the magical atmosphere of possibilities with our napkins. Let your creativity run wild with our versatile selection of motif napkins. Whether for special occasions or crafting with decoupage, our napkins are versatile. Add a personal touch to your table and impress your guests with the detailed patterns and colours of our motif napkins. Discover our beautiful napkins with motif for the perfect table decoration. Design your table decoration according to your wishes and be inspired by our wide selection. Whether for birthdays, weddings or other celebrations, our themed napkins are the perfect choice for stylish table decorations. One pack contains 20 napkins. Here in our shop you will also find candles, handkerchiefs, table runners, tablecloths and an almost unlimited versatile range of other napkins
